name: @synapse/root
description: AI Gateway Monorepo - Unified LLM provider access with caching and retry logic

scripts.dev: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; pnpm --recursive --filter './packages/*' --if-present build && pnpm --parallel --filter gateway --filter @synapse/dashboard dev
scripts.dev-mock: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; pnpm --recursive --filter './packages/*' --if-present build && concurrently -k -n mock,gateway,dashboard -c blue,green,yellow "pnpm --filter @synapse/mock... dev" "sleep 2 && pnpm --filter gateway dev" "sleep 2 && pnpm --filter @synapse/dashboard dev"
